baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Turn everything we've discussed about recurring invoices into a PRD for the project tracker.
evals.expected_output: The agent synthesizes existing conversation and codebase context into the PRD template without starting a new interview, while checking test seams with the user.
assertions: Does not interview for new requirements beyond checking testing seams.
Explores the repo if current codebase state is not already known.
Uses project domain glossary vocabulary and respects relevant ADRs.
Prefers the highest existing seam for tests and checks that seam with the user.

evals.prompt: Publish the PRD once it's ready. We already agreed on the feature scope.
evals.expected_output: The agent previews the PRD body, destination tracker, and ready-for-agent label unless already approved, then publishes a complete PRD with user stories and testing decisions.
assertions: Includes Problem Statement, Solution, extensive User Stories, Implementation Decisions, Testing Decisions, Out of Scope, and Further Notes.
Avoids stale file paths and code snippets except concise prototype-derived decisions.
Includes what makes a good test and which modules or seams will be tested.
